This is my first bot, hope it behaves well >:( I don't think this is gonna reach lots of people but... leave a review if you want. And be merciful. Please. 🐑

Leave me know if there's any mistake, or if I should add something else, please. And I'm open for more suggestions. (I only do fem!pov)

I can't control if the bot speaks for you, or gets a little freaky !! Tried my best to make it on character tho. I tested it and seemed fine. hihi.
